column17: Chart Designer: Dr. Thomas R. Nicely

column2: By 1983, many of the current starters from previous seasons were ending. Quarterback Brian Sipe, in his last season  had 26 touchdown passes and 23 interceptions, nearly the same ratio (28-to-26) he had had in 1979. Mike Pruitt, in his last great season with the Browns, rushed for 1,184 yards.There were just seven contests decided by seven points or less, with the Browns going 4-3. The Browns scored 356 to their opponents' 342. The 83 Browns finished 9-7 and just out of the playoffs, being eliminated on the final day of the regular season.

column1: 3 Includes positive “T1,” “T2” and “T3” yardage (expected values = 27.5, 55 and 82.5, respectively).
